text: What if bigger wings could actually hinder flight? Aircraft design is a delicate balance of lift, drag, weight, and power. As wings get bigger, drag increases. It’s not just about size! Engineers find optimal wing sizes that minimize drag while maximizing lift. So, next time you think bigger is better, remember: efficiency is key in aircraft design.
